brionna jones.comment: Jones underwent right knee surgery Monday and is without a timetable to return, Sara Jane Gamelli of BallisLife.com reports.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Mercury.

courtney vandersloot.comment: Vandersloot (knee) is out for Friday's game against the Mercury.

azura stevens.comment: Stevens (knee) has been ruled out for Friday's game against Phoenix.

olivia nelson-ododa.comment: Nelson-Ododa (ankle) is out for Friday's game against the Aces.

brittney griner.comment: Griner (foot) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Aces.

leila lacan.comment: Lacan remains overseas, so the Sun temporarily suspended her contract Thursday, Khristina Williams of MSG Network reports.

cecilia zandalasini.comment: Zandalasini (concussion) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Sky, Kenzo Fukuda of ClutchPoints.com reports.

tiffany hayes.comment: Hayes (finger) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Sky, Kenzo Fukuda of ClutchPoints.com reports.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

ariel atkins.comment: Atkins (concussion protocol) is listed as out for Friday's game against Toronto.

sania feagin.comment: Feagin (leg) has been ruled out for Friday's game against Toronto.

dana evans.comment: Evans (leg) is out for Friday's game against the Sun.

janiah barker.comment: Barker (head) is out for Friday's game against the Sun.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova will undergo an MRI on her left right knee Friday, Annie Costabile of The Athletic reports.

dorka juhasz.comment: Juhasz (foot) won't play Thursday against the Wings.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier underwent surgery on her left ankle March 24 and is expected to return to on-court activities in early June, Sara Jane Gamelli of BallisLife.com reports.

leonie fiebich.comment: The Liberty exercised their option with Fiebich (overseas commitment) on Thursday.

sabrina ionescu.comment: Ionescu (ankle) is expected to miss at least two weeks, Madeline Kenney of the New York Post reports Monday.

marine fauthoux.comment: Fauthoux (knee) will be joining the Liberty for the 2026 season, Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com reports.

monique akoa makani.comment: Akoa-Makani's (overseas commitment) contract was temporarily suspended by Phoenix on Thursday.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb will undergo an arthroscopy on Thursday to remove a loose body in her left knee. She will be re-evaluated in four to six weeks, Shane Young of the Mercury's official site reports.

karlie samuelson.comment: Samuelson (foot) is out for Thursday's game against the Liberty.

taina mair.comment: Mair (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Tempo.

katie lou samuelson.comment: Samuelson (knee) is out for Wednesday's game against the Tempo.

awa fam.comment: Fam remains overseas, so the Storm temporarily suspended her contract Thursday.

ezi magbegor.comment: The Storm announced Monday that Magbegor is expected to miss at least 6-8 weeks due to a right foot injury, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports.

isabelle harrison.comment: Harrison (hand) is out for Friday's game against the Sparks.

temi fagbenle.comment: Fagbenle (shoulder) is out for Friday's game against the Sparks.

georgia amoore.comment: Amoore is questionable for Friday's game against Indiana due to right knee injury management, per WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

michaela onyenwere.comment: Onyenwere (leg) is out for Friday's game against Indiana.
